days.summary: Work focused on GlobalSpotlight search and styling, file and folder upload previews, branch selection, marketplace navigation fixes, Cursor quota UI, text input IME/font handling, and early cloud-session support cleanup.
frontendChangeBullets: Improved GlobalSpotlight search and styling so users can find actions, sessions, and shortcuts with a clearer launcher experience.
Added richer file and folder upload previews, making it easier to confirm selected workspace content before sending it into a session.
Refined branch selection flows so repository context is easier to choose when starting or managing work.
Fixed marketplace navigation details so browsing models and account-related pages feels more predictable.
Polished Cursor quota UI and text input behavior, including IME and font handling for smoother multilingual typing.
backendChangeBullets: Cleaned up early cloud-session support paths so session handling has a clearer runtime foundation.
Improved Git and repository status plumbing behind branch selection and project context updates.
Strengthened upload and file-sync handling so frontend previews map more reliably to workspace data.
Adjusted marketplace routing support so product navigation can resolve the intended model and listing surfaces.
Tightened session input handling around text composition and quota-related account state integration.

days.summary: Development expanded marketplace and model browsing, sidebar organization, Git status refresh behavior, file sync and upload handling, review/listing sorting, and GlobalSpotlight keyboard navigation.
frontendChangeBullets: Expanded marketplace and model browsing UI with clearer listing organization and easier provider discovery.
Improved sidebar organization so users can move between app areas with less visual noise.
Refined GlobalSpotlight keyboard navigation for faster command selection without leaving the keyboard.
Improved review and listing sorting so users can scan marketplace and feedback content more naturally.
Enhanced file sync and upload interactions so selected files are easier to understand before use.
backendChangeBullets: Improved Git status refresh behavior so repository state updates are fresher across project workflows.
Strengthened file sync and upload handling for more reliable transfer of workspace content into sessions.
Updated marketplace API usage paths supporting model browsing, review ordering, and listing presentation.
Cleaned up data flow behind sidebar and navigation state so app routing has fewer inconsistencies.
Tightened command-launcher data sources that feed GlobalSpotlight actions, sessions, and shortcuts.

days.summary: The UI system was standardized around a unified Button component, shared color tokens, Lobe icon integration, local account setup, and a new My Code Accounts page while deprecated UI packages were removed.
frontendChangeBullets: Standardized the UI around a unified Button component for more consistent actions across the app.
Introduced shared color tokens so surfaces, controls, and states use a more cohesive visual language.
Integrated Lobe icons to improve provider and model presentation in account-related screens.
Added a new My Code Accounts page so users can manage connected coding services in one place.
Improved local account setup flows and removed deprecated UI package usage from visible components.
backendChangeBullets: Cleaned up deprecated UI package dependencies to reduce maintenance burden in the frontend build graph.
Improved account setup plumbing for local provider and coding-service configuration.
Consolidated shared component imports and styling dependencies around the new UI primitives.
Updated provider metadata integration used by account and model icon presentation.
Simplified runtime-facing account management paths behind the new My Code Accounts experience.

days.summary: A broad UI refactor removed Arco dependencies, cleaned unused code, introduced global CSS resets, improved Select and dropdown behavior, updates file path utilities, and added activity event documentation and normalization support.
frontendChangeBullets: Removed Arco-based UI dependencies from more surfaces, giving controls a more consistent ORGII look and feel.
Added a global CSS reset and custom base styles to make layout and typography more predictable across screens.
Improved Select and dropdown behavior, including support for multiple values in selection content.
Refined chat and activity replay presentation so agent progress is easier to revisit.
Cleaned unused UI code, reducing visual inconsistencies and simplifying shared component behavior.
backendChangeBullets: Updated file path utilities so workspace and file-operation code can normalize paths more consistently.
Added activity event documentation and normalization support for more reliable replay data handling.
Reduced dependency surface by removing Arco-related runtime and build references.
Cleaned unused code paths that no longer supported current UI and activity flows.
Improved type and utility foundations behind dropdown state, file paths, and activity event processing.

days.summary: Work continued on removing Arco, consolidating ModernDiff and modal components, improving provider onboarding and marketplace APIs, adding pause mid-session, and tightening type safety in input and workflow hooks.
frontendChangeBullets: Continued replacing Arco components with ORGII-styled primitives for a more unified interface.
Consolidated ModernDiff UI pieces so code-review surfaces feel clearer and easier to maintain.
Improved modal components for provider onboarding, marketplace setup, and shared confirmation flows.
Added stronger in-session controls for pausing long-running agent work mid-session.
Tightened input and workflow hook behavior to make chat and workflow interactions more reliable.
backendChangeBullets: Improved provider onboarding and marketplace API connections behind account setup flows.
Added runtime support paths for pausing sessions while preserving current session context.
Tightened type safety in input and workflow hooks to reduce state-shape errors.
Removed remaining outdated component dependencies from runtime-facing frontend modules.
Consolidated diff and modal infrastructure so downstream session and review data flows are simpler.

days.summary: Session creation, OAuth listing, multiple account support, GlobalSpotlight clone/session options, review panels, and Kanban routing received feature work while old session controls and context code were removed.
frontendChangeBullets: Enhanced session creation with clearer options for starting new work from GlobalSpotlight.
Improved OAuth listing and multiple-account support so users can choose among connected providers more easily.
Added more GlobalSpotlight clone and session options for faster workspace actions.
Improved review panels and Kanban routing to reduce context switching between planning and inspection.
Removed older session controls and context UI that no longer matched the current workflow.
backendChangeBullets: Cleaned up old session control paths and context code to simplify session creation internals.
Expanded account and OAuth listing data handling to support multiple connected accounts.
Improved marketplace listing support used by account selection and provider setup.
Updated routing and import structure behind review panels and Kanban views.
Strengthened session-launch data flow from GlobalSpotlight into clone and session creation actions.

days.summary: Work Items, Kanban detail panels, session history, marketplace transaction APIs, OAuth/listing fixes, and routing/import cleanup were advanced, with supporting UI package and configuration updates.
frontendChangeBullets: Improved Work Items and Kanban detail panels with richer planning context and clearer item inspection.
Expanded session history surfaces so previous agent work is easier to find and revisit.
Improved marketplace transaction views and account-related flows for clearer billing and provider context.
Fixed OAuth and listing UI issues that affected provider setup and marketplace account configuration.
Updated shared UI packages and configuration so planning, marketplace, and session surfaces feel more consistent.
backendChangeBullets: Advanced marketplace transaction APIs used by wallet and listing experiences.
Improved OAuth and listing integration paths behind provider account setup.
Updated routing and import structure to reduce stale project and Work Item references.
Strengthened session history data handling so timeline and previous-session views can load more reliably.
Cleaned configuration and package usage supporting Work Items, Kanban, and marketplace modules.

days.summary: The route and tab systems were heavily consolidated, project identifiers shifted toward repo terminology, ModernCodeViewer and virtualized diff components were introduced, and deprecated work-item/project files were cleaned out.
frontendChangeBullets: Consolidated route and tab systems so navigation between major app areas is more predictable.
Shifted project identifiers toward repo terminology, making labels better match how users think about codebases.
Introduced ModernCodeViewer for clearer code reading inside ORGII.
Added virtualized diff components so large code reviews are easier to browse.
Cleaned deprecated Work Item and project files from visible planning flows.
backendChangeBullets: Simplified route and tab state foundations to reduce duplicated navigation logic.
Updated data naming from project-centered identifiers toward repository-oriented terminology.
Removed deprecated Work Item and project file paths that no longer served the current planning system.
Added infrastructure for virtualized diff rendering to handle larger review data more efficiently.
Improved code-viewer data plumbing for file navigation and source display.

days.summary: Global session sync, chat/start-session flows, CodeMirror diff support, Work Desk removal, Gantt integration, and file sync controls were updated alongside import and type-safety cleanup.
frontendChangeBullets: Improved global session sync so session lists and chat startup state stay more consistent.
Refined chat and start-session flows with clearer defaults and controls.
Added CodeMirror diff support for better file comparison in editor and review contexts.
Updated Work Items with Gantt-related planning integration for richer timeline context.
Improved file sync controls so users can better understand what workspace content is being synchronized.
backendChangeBullets: Improved global session synchronization logic across chat and session startup flows.
Added CodeMirror diff support infrastructure for file comparison data.
Updated file-sync control paths that connect workspace file state to the UI.
Cleaned imports and type-safety issues in session, Work Item, and planning code.
Removed Work Desk-related code paths that no longer fit the current product structure.

days.summary: Workflow editing received loop actions, new edge types, view modes, drag-and-drop improvements, linked repository/status features, and listing health re-validation support.
frontendChangeBullets: Added loop actions to the workflow editor so repeated steps can be represented directly in flows.
Introduced new workflow edge types for clearer branching and action relationships.
Improved workflow view modes and drag-and-drop behavior for easier editing.
Added linked repository and status features so workflows can reflect source-control context.
Improved listing health re-validation feedback in marketplace-related flows.
backendChangeBullets: Extended workflow data handling to support loop actions and additional edge types.
Improved repository-linking and status plumbing used by workflow screens.
Added support for listing health re-validation so marketplace data can be checked more reliably.
Updated drag-and-drop and workflow action state handling to preserve editor structure.
Strengthened workflow action-management internals behind layout and branching controls.

days.summary: WorkflowDetail was refined with if/else grouping, scope management, split panels, dropdown sizing, and action-management cleanup, while marketplace account configuration and Cursor token capture were fixed.
frontendChangeBullets: Refined WorkflowDetail with clearer if/else grouping for conditional flows.
Improved workflow scope management so actions and branches are easier to reason about.
Added split-panel refinements to make workflow details easier to inspect side by side.
Improved dropdown sizing across workflow and configuration panels.
Fixed marketplace account configuration and Cursor token capture flows for smoother setup.
backendChangeBullets: Improved workflow detail data structures supporting if/else grouping and scoped actions.
Cleaned action-management internals for workflow detail editing.
Fixed account configuration paths used by marketplace provider setup.
Improved Cursor token capture handling for account connection flows.
Tightened dropdown and split-panel state handling in workflow configuration components.

days.summary: Chat rendering and app initialization were improved, session creator defaults gained localStorage persistence, workflow list split view and branch handling advanced, and UI styling/loading indicators were polished.
frontendChangeBullets: Improved chat rendering so agent messages and activity blocks display more smoothly.
Polished app initialization and loading indicators to make startup feel more responsive.
Persisted session creator defaults so user choices carry across app restarts.
Advanced workflow list split view for easier browsing and editing.
Improved branch handling in workflow and repository-related screens.
backendChangeBullets: Added localStorage persistence for session creator defaults.
Improved app initialization sequencing for smoother startup behavior.
Updated chat rendering data flow so session content can be displayed more reliably.
Strengthened branch-handling logic used by workflow and repository features.
Improved workflow list state management behind split-view presentation.

days.summary: The chat/event replay system was extensively reorganized with Jotai-backed replay state, unified event IDs, file action rendering, interrupt session support, component showcase mode, and deprecated activity components removed.
frontendChangeBullets: Reorganized chat and event replay around shared replay state so agent progress is easier to follow.
Added unified event IDs to make replayed chat activity more consistent.
Improved file action rendering inside chat blocks for clearer visibility into agent operations.
Added interrupt session support for stronger control over long-running agent work.
Introduced component showcase mode while removing older activity components from the UI.
backendChangeBullets: Moved replay state into Jotai-backed atoms for more predictable event playback.
Added unified event identifiers across chat and activity replay data.
Implemented interrupt-session support in the session control path.
Cleaned deprecated activity component logic from the session and replay stack.
Improved file-action event data handling for chat block rendering.

days.summary: Simulator and file-operation IDE work added playback controls, searchable SimulatorIDE behavior, list_dir/terminal handling, expandable directory views, File Operations IDE panels, and cleanup of older simulator/documentation artifacts.
frontendChangeBullets: Added simulator playback controls so users can review agent actions more directly.
Improved SimulatorIDE with searchable behavior for easier inspection of recorded steps.
Added expandable directory views for clearer file-operation review.
Introduced File Operations IDE panels to visualize file and terminal actions more effectively.
Improved terminal and list_dir handling in simulator-focused screens.
backendChangeBullets: Improved simulator event handling for list_dir and terminal actions.
Cleaned older simulator and documentation artifacts that no longer matched current behavior.
Added file-operation data support for IDE-style inspection panels.
Updated playback state handling behind simulator controls.
Strengthened directory tree data handling for expandable file-operation views.

days.summary: Session architecture moved toward a unified session store, simulator artifacts were consolidated or removed, chat blocks shifted into the session module, legacy Git status cache was removed, and Kanban/session task movement improved.
frontendChangeBullets: Moved session UI toward a unified session store for more consistent chat and activity behavior.
Consolidated or removed simulator artifacts to reduce duplicate interfaces.
Shifted chat blocks into the session module so session content is easier to maintain.
Improved Kanban and session task movement for smoother planning workflows.
Refined Git status presentation by removing an older cache path.
backendChangeBullets: Advanced unified session store architecture for session and chat state.
Removed legacy Git status cache logic so repository state can flow through newer paths.
Consolidated simulator-related data and artifacts behind current session workflows.
Reorganized chat block code into the session module for clearer ownership.
Improved task movement logic connecting Kanban items with session state.

days.summary: Profile and wallet features were added, including draggable profile widgets, editable profile fields, a membership panel, list virtualization, and simulator styling/event synchronization refinements.
frontendChangeBullets: Added profile and wallet features that make account status and balances easier to access.
Introduced draggable profile widgets for a more flexible personal dashboard experience.
Added editable profile fields so users can update account-facing details directly.
Added a membership panel to surface subscription or membership context more clearly.
Improved simulator styling and event synchronization for smoother action review.
backendChangeBullets: Added profile API support behind editable profile fields and widgets.
Improved wallet and membership data connections for account-facing UI.
Added list virtualization support for better performance on larger profile or wallet lists.
Strengthened simulator event synchronization data flow.
Updated route and tab handling for new profile and wallet surfaces.

days.summary: Chat drag-and-drop, theme configuration, workspace context updates to Jotai, session event consolidation, file delete UI, lint cleanup, local activity adaptation, and profile API/widget improvements were completed.
frontendChangeBullets: Added file and folder drag-and-drop to chat so users can attach workspace context more naturally.
Improved theme configuration surfaces for clearer visual customization.
Added file delete UI to make workspace cleanup actions visible and direct.
Improved chat and local activity adaptation for clearer replay and session context.
Refined profile widgets and account API presentation.
backendChangeBullets: Moved workspace context state to Jotai for more predictable shared state management.
Consolidated session events used by chat, replay, and local activity views.
Improved file-delete operation support behind the new UI.
Cleaned lint issues and tightened frontend type behavior.
Updated profile API and widget data handling for account-related surfaces.

days.summary: The LiteEditor gained terminal panels, source control integration, tree/search support, theme-synchronized terminal behavior, diff text selection, and related editor/logging cleanup.
frontendChangeBullets: Added terminal panels to LiteEditor for a more complete in-editor development workflow.
Integrated source control into LiteEditor so repository changes are visible beside files.
Added tree and search support to make file navigation easier inside the editor.
Synchronized terminal styling with the app theme for a more consistent editing experience.
Improved diff text selection so code review and comparison workflows feel more natural.
backendChangeBullets: Improved terminal state handling behind LiteEditor panels.
Added source-control integration plumbing for editor-level Git views.
Updated tree and search data paths used by the editor file browser.
Cleaned editor and logging code around terminal and diff behavior.
Strengthened CodeMirror and diff support for selectable comparison text.

days.summary: LiteEditor matured with saving, editing, terminal state, split view, bottom panels, linting, CodeMirror search/minimap/go-to-line, and source-control/file-tree search improvements alongside user profile API work.
frontendChangeBullets: Added saving and editing capabilities to LiteEditor for a more practical in-app editor.
Improved terminal state and bottom panels so development tools stay organized.
Added split view support for comparing or editing files side by side.
Improved CodeMirror search, minimap, and go-to-line navigation.
Enhanced FileTreePanel search and Git sync actions in the StatusBar.
backendChangeBullets: Improved editor file-save and edit-operation support.
Strengthened terminal state management used by bottom panels.
Added linting and CodeMirror navigation infrastructure for editor diagnostics.
Improved source-control and file-tree search data handling.
Advanced user profile API work alongside editor feature development.

days.summary: LiteEditor/SoydEditor source control was completed, LSP diagnostics and linting landed, terminal settings moved into system settings, Git file history and timeline diff features improved, and the editor was renamed toward SoydEditor.
frontendChangeBullets: Completed LiteEditor/SoydEditor source-control UI for clearer repository workflows.
Added LSP diagnostics and linting feedback to surface code issues in the editor.
Moved terminal settings into system settings for easier configuration.
Improved Git file history and timeline diff views for richer source-control context.
Renamed the editor experience toward SoydEditor, aligning labels with the product direction.
backendChangeBullets: Added LSP diagnostics support and linting integration behind the editor.
Moved terminal configuration into system settings data flow.
Improved Git file history and timeline diff APIs used by source-control views.
Completed source-control support paths for LiteEditor/SoydEditor.
Updated editor naming and module references toward SoydEditor.

days.summary: Source control gained commit dropdown actions, commit formatting, merge conflict detection, file reload/versioning, Git status centralization, and performance fixes for diagnostics, right panels, and tab switching.
frontendChangeBullets: Added commit dropdown actions so source-control tasks are available directly from the commit UI.
Improved commit formatting for clearer review before submitting changes.
Added merge conflict detection feedback in source-control surfaces without using technical clutter.
Improved file reload and versioning behavior so editor content stays current.
Improved diagnostics, right panels, and tab switching responsiveness.
backendChangeBullets: Centralized Git status handling for more consistent repository state.
Added commit action and formatting support in source-control internals.
Improved conflict detection used by source-control dialogs and status views.
Strengthened file reload and versioning data paths.
Applied performance fixes for diagnostics, right-panel state, and tab switching.

days.summary: Branch management, checkout conflict dialogs, search filters/pagination, FileTree and Explorer performance, terminal output context signals, Git operation detection, and browser DevTools logging were enhanced.
frontendChangeBullets: Enhanced branch management with clearer checkout and conflict-dialog flows.
Improved search filters and pagination for easier navigation through larger result sets.
Optimized FileTree and Explorer performance for smoother browsing.
Added clearer terminal output context signals so command output is easier to interpret.
Improved browser DevTools logging visibility for debugging embedded browser behavior.
backendChangeBullets: Improved Git operation detection behind branch and checkout workflows.
Added support for checkout conflict dialogs and related repository state checks.
Optimized FileTree and Explorer data handling for performance.
Enhanced terminal output context signaling from runtime events.
Improved browser process and DevTools logging support.

days.summary: GlobalSpotlight selectors and keyboard/mouse logic were consolidated, terminal and file state moved into Jotai atoms, EditorService file operations were added, CodeMirror folding/progress UI improved, and session chat titles and thread filtering were added.
frontendChangeBullets: Consolidated GlobalSpotlight selectors and input behavior for smoother keyboard and mouse navigation.
Improved terminal and file state handling so editor surfaces stay in sync.
Added CodeMirror folding and progress UI for better large-file navigation.
Added session chat titles and thread filtering for easier session browsing.
Improved file navigation and editor actions through EditorService-backed operations.
backendChangeBullets: Moved terminal and file state into Jotai atoms for more predictable shared state.
Added EditorService file operations used by editor and file-management UI.
Improved CodeMirror folding and progress data handling.
Added session chat title and thread-filtering support in session data flow.
Consolidated command-selector logic behind GlobalSpotlight actions.

days.summary: Rust/Tauri-side Git watcher and dialog support advanced with discard-change dialogs, . git watching, watcher health monitoring, Git error dialogs, browser/process module refactors, and SoydEditor performance work.
frontendChangeBullets: Added discard-change dialogs so users can confirm risky source-control actions.
Improved Git error dialogs to make repository issues easier to understand.
Improved SoydEditor performance for smoother file and source-control interactions.
Added clearer watcher health feedback around repository monitoring.
Refined dialog behavior through Tauri-side dialog support.
backendChangeBullets: Advanced Rust/Tauri-side Git watcher support for repository status updates.
Added dialog plugin support used by discard-change and Git error dialogs.
Streamlined .git directory watching and event processing.
Improved watcher health monitoring and polling intervals.
Refactored browser and process modules to support cleaner runtime behavior.

days.summary: Layout and GlobalChatPanel integration were refined, file search and Spotlight command behavior improved, GitOperationsService was introduced for unified Git operations, and GUI action-system documentation was updated.
frontendChangeBullets: Refined layout views and GlobalChatPanel integration so chat fits more naturally into the workspace.
Improved Spotlight command behavior for faster action discovery.
Enhanced file search with more comprehensive results and clearer tree structure.
Updated GUI action-system documentation for clearer product and developer understanding.
Improved source-control interactions through unified Git operation entry points.
backendChangeBullets: Introduced GitOperationsService for unified Git operation handling.
Improved file-search data flow to support comprehensive results and tree output.
Updated command-system behavior backing Spotlight actions.
Cleaned layout integration paths around GlobalChatPanel state.
Refined action-system structure used by GUI command dispatch.

days.summary: Human tools panels were reorganized, browser support and inspector functionality changed substantially, database integrations for Supabase and Turso/LibSQL were added, Git diff support for renamed files landed, and chat/agent review features improved.
frontendChangeBullets: Reorganized Human Tools panels so development utilities are easier to find and use.
Improved browser support and inspector behavior for richer embedded debugging workflows.
Added clearer review surfaces so users can inspect changes and feedback with less context switching.
Improved Git diff display for renamed files in code-review flows.
Refined chat and agent review features for smoother collaboration with agent output.
backendChangeBullets: Added database integrations for Supabase and Turso/LibSQL.
Improved browser and inspector runtime modules supporting embedded debugging.
Added Git diff support for renamed files.
Consolidated Human Tools panel hooks and views to simplify tool state.
Updated chat and agent review support paths behind review surfaces.

days.summary: Developer tooling and BrowserDevTools advanced through component indexing, AST source mapping, SWC build performance, HMR improvements, source navigation, code inspector diagnostics, and parallelized app initialization.
frontendChangeBullets: Advanced BrowserDevTools with component indexing for better source inspection.
Added AST source mapping so UI elements can be traced back to source more easily.
Improved source navigation and code inspector diagnostics for developer workflows.
Improved app initialization responsiveness by running critical services in parallel.
Refined navigation surfaces connected to developer tooling and inspection flows.
backendChangeBullets: Added component indexing infrastructure for BrowserDevTools.
Implemented AST source mapping support for source navigation.
Improved SWC build performance and HMR behavior.
Parallelized app initialization for faster startup of critical services.
Enhanced code inspector diagnostics used by developer tooling.

days.summary: The source tree underwent a major updates from page-based structure to modules/scaffold/engines/framework organization, while design tools, activity data utilities, Supabase/Tauri shell fixes, Copilot setup, and environment cleanup were added.
frontendChangeBullets: Reorganized the source tree from page-based structure toward modules, scaffold, engines, and framework areas.
Improved design tools and activity data utilities for clearer inspection workflows.
Refined settings and environment-related UI as part of project cleanup.
Improved file and folder handling in the reorganized module structure.
Cleaned up visible app structure so navigation and feature ownership are easier to understand.
backendChangeBullets: Updated module and import organization across pages, scaffold, engines, and framework code.
Added Supabase and Tauri shell fixes supporting integration and command behavior.
Added Copilot setup support paths.
Cleaned environment-related configuration and runtime setup.
Improved activity data utilities used by replay and inspection features.

days.summary: Post-updates cleanup continued with modular imports, tab-system overhaul, route cleanup, semantic search and human tools improvements, native Rust key validation, command-system zod refactor, and removal of obsolete UI/documentation.
frontendChangeBullets: Overhauled the tab system so open views and route state behave more consistently.
Cleaned route structure after the broader source-tree reorganization.
Improved semantic search and Human Tools surfaces for better discovery and inspection.
Removed obsolete UI and documentation from product-facing areas.
Added modular architecture for the IDE Connection Manager and clearer view documentation.
backendChangeBullets: Cleaned modular imports across the reorganized source structure.
Added native Rust key validation for account and provider setup reliability.
Refactored the command system with zod for stronger validation.
Improved semantic search support paths behind Human Tools.
Removed obsolete code and documentation artifacts that no longer matched current runtime behavior.

days.summary: Settings, component styling, DOM-based editing, diff/patch APIs, hybrid and incremental search, Qdrant sidecar startup, Kiro agent support, and removal of old Project/Work Item APIs dominated the day.
frontendChangeBullets: Refined settings screens with clearer controls and component styling.
Improved DOM-based editing interactions for more direct content manipulation.
Enhanced diff and patch UI so code changes are easier to review.
Added hybrid and incremental search experiences for faster discovery.
Added Kiro agent support visibility alongside editor and settings work.
backendChangeBullets: Added diff and patch APIs supporting richer review and editing flows.
Added Qdrant sidecar startup and interface integration for search support.
Improved hybrid and incremental search runtime behavior.
Added Kiro agent support paths.
Removed old Project and Work Item APIs that no longer fit the current data model.

days.summary: Settings/navigation were restructured, monitor and repo sections added, shortcut handling unified, behavior analytics removed, dependency cycle checks added, memory/process metrics introduced, and semantic search moved from Qdrant toward USearch with improved error handling.
frontendChangeBullets: Restructured settings navigation with clearer monitor and repo sections.
Unified shortcut handling for faster power-user workflows.
Added memory and process metrics views to improve runtime visibility.
Removed behavior analytics surfaces that no longer matched the product direction.
Improved layout around the new monitor section in settings.
